name: VICTOR ACHARD
summary: Customer-facing commercial professional with experience supporting autonomous vehicle deployments in industrial and airport environments. Background at the intersection of sales, operations, and technology adoption in emerging markets.

experience.title: Business Development Representative
bullets: Serve as the primary customer interface across the full sales cycle for autonomous vehicle solution in industrial and airport environments, from initial discovery through contract negotiation and post-signature engagement.

Co-lead U.S. market entry efforts as part of a two-person sales team, establishing early customer relationships and educating stakeholders on integrating autonomous technology into existing industrial operations.

Act as Account Manager for a major international airport (40 million+ passengers per annum), owning commercial negotiations, contract drafting, and coordination across presales, technical, and operational workstreams.

Lead customer-specific business case development, creating financial and operational models to quantify cost savings, productivity gains, and deployment feasibility for OEMs, logistics yards, ports, airports, and rail facilities.

Partner closely with operations and engineering teams on site visits, customer workshops, and early project scoping, introducing technical teams to clients and supporting feasibility assessments across multiple countries.

Enable customer engagement and deal progression through targeted marketing initiatives, including executive showcases, development of sales collateral, and end-to-end organization of customer-facing events.

experience.title: Marketing Insights Coordinator
bullets: Conducted market research across public and private transportation sectors to understand the opportunities and role of autonomous vehicle technologies today and how transportation could benefit from these technologies.
Analyzed competitors' go-to-market approaches and messaging across different use cases, identifying positioning gaps and opportunities for EasyMile.
Conducted market research across public and private transportation sectors to understand where autonomous vehicle technologies presented meaningful opportunities.

experience.title: Global Product Marketing
bullets: Supported global product marketing activities for a product line within a healthcare environment, contributing to the go-to-market transition for this new product generation.
Analyzed sales performance and market data for the product to support launch planning and commercial decision-making.
Structured and reviewed large volumes of customer feedback and complaints to identify recurring issues and inform improvements across labs and hospital customers.

skills.items: Full-cycle sales support · Account management · Cross-functional coordination · CRM & opportunity tracking
Market & competitive analysis · Product positioning · Data analysis (Excel, SAS) · Data Visualization

education.degree: Bachelor of Science – Honors Marketing and Statistics
